item.title: Host-side deployment subdirectory names hardcoded in cloud/ module
item.intent: Host-side deployment subdirectory names and key filenames have a single source of truth in config/paths.ts. Changing the ClawHQ deployment directory structure requires editing one file.
item.description: src/cloud/heartbeat/reporter.ts and src/cloud/fleet/discovery.ts hardcode the host-side deployment subdirectory names as inline string literals, same BUG-011/BUG-025 constant-scattering pattern. Locations: reporter.ts:104 join(deployDir, 'engine', 'credentials.json'), reporter.ts:122 join(deployDir, 'engine', 'docker-compose.yml'), reporter.ts:128 join(deployDir, 'engine', 'openclaw.json'), reporter.ts:152 join(deployDir, 'workspace', 'memory'), reporter.ts:27 join(deployDir, 'cloud', HEARTBEAT_FILE), discovery.ts:122 join(agentDeployDir, 'engine', 'openclaw.json'). The subdirectory names 'engine', 'workspace', 'cloud' and key filenames within them are part of ClawHQ deployment directory layout and should be constants in src/config/paths.ts alongside DEFAULT_DEPLOY_DIR. Steps: (1) add DEPLOY_ENGINE_SUBDIR = 'engine', DEPLOY_WORKSPACE_SUBDIR = 'workspace', DEPLOY_CLOUD_SUBDIR = 'cloud', DEPLOY_ENGINE_OPENCLAW_JSON = 'openclaw.json', DEPLOY_ENGINE_COMPOSE_FILE = 'docker-compose.yml', DEPLOY_ENGINE_CREDENTIALS_JSON = 'credentials.json', DEPLOY_WORKSPACE_MEMORY_DIR = 'memory' to src/config/paths.ts; (2) update reporter.ts to use path.join(deployDir, DEPLOY_ENGINE_SUBDIR, DEPLOY_ENGINE_CREDENTIALS_JSON) etc.; (3) update discovery.ts accordingly; (4) run cloud/ tests. Scope: 3 files, ~15 lines changed. Zero logic change.
